name: functions

scripts.test:integration: npm run build && cd .. && firebase emulators:exec --only firestore,functions --config firebase.test.json --project test-project "cd functions && npx jest -c jest.integration.config.js"
scripts.serve: npm run build && firebase emulators:start --only functions

comment_overrides: Security overrides for the functions npm tree (used by Firebase deploy's `npm ci` — the root pnpm overrides do NOT apply here). Same-major fixes chosen to avoid runtime breakage in the deployed backend. minimatch is intentionally NOT forced: its vulnerable 5.x/9.x instances sit beside a safe 3.1.2 (glob@3), so a global force would break that consumer; the advisory is a ReDoS in path-matching on trusted inputs, low risk for a backend.
